channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Dillon Gabriel rallies No. 3 Oregon past No. 2 Ohio State, 32-31
item.description: EUGENE, Ore. (AP) — Dillon Gabriel threw two touchdown passes and ran for another late score to help third-ranked Oregon hand No. 2 Ohio State its first loss of the season, 32-31 on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: ANNE M. PETERSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Pochettino wins US debut as Musah and Pepi score second-half goals in 2-0 victory over Panama
item.description: Mauricio Pochettino won his debut as U.S. coach, getting a 49th-minute goal from Yunus Musah off an assist from AC Milan teammate Christian Pulisic and a stoppage-time strike from Ricardo Pepi for a 2-0 win over Panama.
item.dc:creator: Jim Vertuno, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Dylan Sampson has 1-yard TD run in OT to lift No. 8 Tennessee past Florida, 23-17
item.description: KNOXVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Dylan Sampson scored on his third touchdown of the game on a 1-yard run in overtime to give No. 8 Tennessee a 23-17 victory over Florida on Saturday night. The Volunteers (5-1, 2-1 Southeastern Conference) went to overtime for only the second time.
item.dc:creator: AL LESAR, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Keller scores game-winner in OT as Utah HC stays unbeaten
item.description: NEW YORK (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club took a big bite out of the Big Apple this week. After an overtime win over the New York Islanders on Thursday, Utah did the same thing to the Rangers at Madison Square Garden on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Texas stymies Oklahoma's offense to earn Red River Rivalry win in foes' first matchup as SEC members
item.description: For the first time since 2009, Texas is 6-0. The Longhorns won their sixth game of the season, defeating rival Oklahoma in dominating fashion.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Vasily Espindola and the Redland Chargers take on the Fruita Cowboys
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—In a dramatic 10U football playoff game, the Redland Chargers overcame a 13-point deficit in the second quarter, despite losing their starting quarterback to injury.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Matt McCarty takes lead at Black Desert in his 2nd PGA Tour start
item.description: Matt McCarty took a two-stroke lead into the final round in his second PGA Tour start, shooting a 7-under 64 on Saturday in the inaugural Black Desert Championship.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Daniels returns at QB, but Stanford can’t keep up with No. 11 Notre Dame
item.description: The Cardinal scored on its opening drive, keyed by a 27-yard run from Ashton Daniels, but never came close to scoring after that.
item.dc:creator: Harold Gutmann, The Mercury News

item.title: No. 4 Penn State rallies back to beat USC 33-30 in overtime on TE Tyler Warren's record day
item.description: No. 4 Penn State rallied from a 14-point deficit in the second half for a 33-30 overtime victory over Southern California.
item.dc:creator: Greg Beacham, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Thomas hits grand slam off Skubal, Guardians down Tigers 7-3 to reach AL Championship Series
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — For the third time in less than a month, the Cleveland Guardians made a semi-circle in the middle of their clubhouse and emptied champagne and beer bottles on each other as “Rocky Top” blasted through the speakers. The choice of music is unique. So is this team.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: North Carolina football player Tylee Craft dies from rare lung cancer at 23
item.description: North Carolina football player Tylee Craft died Saturday morning from a rare form of lung cancer, coach Mack Brown said. “This young man fought so hard for his two and a half years,” Brown said. “The doctors told us he outlived what he should’ve.
item.dc:creator: DOUG BONJOUR, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ronaldo scores again in Nations League win for perfect Portugal. Spain finds replacement for Rodri
item.description: Cristiano Ronaldo scored his record-extending 133rd international goal to keep Portugal perfect in the Nations League with a 3-1 win over Poland on Saturday, and Spain struck late to edge Denmark 1-0.
item.dc:creator: JOSEPH WILSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: NFL commissioner Roger Goodell says international Super Bowl could ‘one day’ happen: ‘It wouldn’t surprise me’
item.description: NFL commissioner Roger Goodell appeared open to the possibility of "one day" hosting the Super Bowl in an international city amid the league's push to grow the game globally.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Carpenter delivers pinch-hit RBI single for Tigers in Game 5, limping to first with hamstring injury
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Kerry Carpenter delivered again for the Tigers. Slowed by a hamstring injury, Carpenter hit a pinch-hit RBI single in the fifth inning Saturday to give Detroit a 1-0 lead over the Cleveland Guardians in Game 5 of the AL Division Series.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: EXCLUSIVE: NFL wife Devon Mostert receives racist hate online for defending DeSantis against Harris
item.description: Devon Mostert praised Ron DeSantis' response to Hurricane Helene and Hurricane Milton making landfall in Florida back-to-back. Mostert received racist backlash from social media users.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tyreek Hill jokes about Tua Tagovailoa running the ball upon concussion return: 'Who gone call the next play'
item.description: Tyreek Hill joked about Tua Tagovailoa's ability to call plays in response to an X user that proposed the quarterback try a dangerous play.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Blackhawks visit Oilers in Western Conference play
item.description: Chicago Blackhawks (0-1-1, in the Central Division) vs. Edmonton Oilers (0-1, in the Pacific Division) Edmonton, Alberta; Saturday, 10 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Cam Skattebo runs for 156 yards and 2 TDs, Arizona State knocks off No. 16 Utah 27-19
item.description: TEMPE, Ariz. (AP) — Kenny Dillingham screamed through an adrenaline-fueled interview and got caught up in a student mosh pit. The sea of humanity enveloping him, the Arizona State coach and alum joined in, jumping and shouting with the students after Arizona State's 27-19 victory over No.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Golden State Valkyries name team's first head coach
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- Twenty years after playing professional women’s basketball in San Jose, Natalie Nakase is returning to the Bay Area after being named Thursday as the Golden State Valkyries' first head coach.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Mense, KRON4

item.title: Fruita's Olivia Wirth gets family support on senior night
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—Growing up the youngest of three in a competitive, athletic household, Fruita Monument senior Olivia Wirth learned the value of hard work from her parents and siblings.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Lakers show off California Destiny City Edition uniforms, new-look court
item.description: The Los Angeles Lakers are showing off some brand-new uniforms and a few changes to Crypto.com Arena court ahead of the 2024-25 NBA season. The California Destiny City Edition uniform incorporates a black and purple gradient and replaces the iconic Lakers lettering with Lake Show on the front.
item.dc:creator: Tony Kurzweil, KTLA 5

item.title: Where to watch Padres vs. Dodgers NLDS Game 3
item.description: The San Diego Padres and the Los Angeles Dodgers will meet again in Game 3 of the best-of-five National League Division Series Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: San Diego Padres urge fans to 'stay classy'
item.description: San Diego Padres management is asking fans to demonstrate good behavior as the contentious National League Division Series shifts from Dodger Stadium to Petco Park on Tuesday, tied at one game apiece.
item.dc:creator: Marc Sternfield, KTLA 5

item.title: Column: The level up goes beyond Caleb Williams
item.description: The Chicago Bears' offense has found success with Caleb Williams at quarterback, DJ Moore at wide receiver, D'Andre Swift and Roschon Johnson at running back, and a revamped offensive line, leading to a 36-10 victory over the Carolina Panthers.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Castellanos wins Game 2 for Phillies with 9th-inning single, top Mets 7-6
item.description: Castellanos, who led the major leagues this season with four walk-off hits, tossed his helmet and was mobbed by teammates on the infield as a game that seemed to slip away one inning earlier turned into one more comeback for the NL East champions.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: What is rhabdo? How intense workouts could seriously hurt you
item.description: A dozen Tufts University men’s lacrosse players were diagnosed with the rare muscle injury in September.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Baseball fans discuss Dodgers’ chances in NLDS Game 2 over donuts
item.description: After a rollercoaster of emotions in Game 1 of the National League Divisional Series, baseball lovers were up early getting donuts in Inglewood and eager to share their thoughts with the news on Sunday's matchup between the Los Angeles Dodgers and the San Diego Padres.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5
